# Human in the Loop Talent — LLM Context File

## Company Info
Name: Human in the Loop Talent
URL: https://humaninthelooptalent.com
Description: AI-Augmented Workforce Architecture consultancy helping founders and CEOs scale leverage, not headcount

## Key Concepts
- Workforce Architecture: Strategic team design for AI-era companies
- Super IC: Exceptional individual contributor who multiplies team leverage
- AI Readiness: Organization's preparedness to adopt AI-native practices
- Role Clarity: Clear definition of responsibilities and expectations
- Execution Bottleneck Severity: Impact of hiring/org structure gaps on execution
- Leverage Opportunity: Potential for exponential impact through strategic hires
- Hire/Automate/Super-IC Framework: Decision framework for scaling teams
- AI-Native Org Design: Organizational structures optimized for AI-augmented work

## Content Pages

### Main Insights Index
- /insights/

### Subpath Indexes
- /insights/workforce-architecture/
- /insights/ai-native-org-design/
- /insights/super-ic/
- /insights/hire-automate-or-super-ic/
- /insights/startup-recruiting/
- /insights/post-funding-hiring/

### Content Articles by Subpath

#### Workforce Architecture
